calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar May-20-2008 Off Calendar

Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Off Calendar Apr-24-2008 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 218, Comm. William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Lois Jones, 3689.

Ann M. Guevara, Esq. appeared with plaintiff Jesus Franco, who was placed under oath and examined.
No appearance by defendant Jesus Velasquez, a/k/a Jesus Velazquez.
Default entered against defendant on December 26, 2007.
Doe defendants dismissed on February 25, 2008.

Plaintiff introduces the following documentary evidence:

Exhibit 1---Copy of $5,000.00 check to Jesus Velazques dated 04/14/08----------------ID/EVID.
Exhibit 2---Copy of $10,000.00 check to Jesus Velasquez dated 04/14/08---------------ID/EVID.
Exhibit 3---Copy of $15,000.00 check to Jesus Velazquez dated 04/29/08---------------ID/EVID.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Jesus Franco, and against the Defaulted Defendant Jesus Velasquez, a/k/a Jesus Velazquez as follows:

Damages/Principal - $30,000.00.
Prejudgment Interest $7,412.00.
Costs $420.00, for a total of $37,832.00.

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.
